def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    window = params['window']
    threshold = params['threshold']
    df['sma'] = ta.trend.sma_indicator(df['close'], window=window)
    df['distance'] = (df['close'] - df['sma']) / df['sma']
    signals = np.where(df['distance'] > threshold, -1, np.where(df['distance'] < -threshold, 1, 0))
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: EUR/GBP exhibits mean-reverting behavior where deviations from the moving average tend to revert, providing opportunities for contrarian trades.
